specific_mechanism: Plants are connected by underground fungal networks that transport carbon between trees; resource-rich donors transfer to resource-poor receivers, mediated by carbon-cost arbitrage
llm_application: LLM agent network with shared embedding 'soil' that lets information-rich agents subsidize information-poor agents; carbon-cost arbitrage = token-budget transfer between agents.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes lichenology feedback-attenuation mapping as proposed.
